prompt: Create a dramatic vertical studio portrait of a confident adult man wearing a tailored black suit, crisp white dress shirt, and black tie, standing centered with arms crossed in a powerful executive pose. His visible hair is short, dense, curly, and golden blond with darker roots, glowing from a fiery red rim light; his face is intentionally hidden by a perfectly centered, flat opaque warm reddish-brown rectangle covering the entire facial area from forehead to chin, while ears, hair, neck, suit, and hands remain visible. Use a dark cinematic background filled with swirling deep red smoke and haze, with strong red backlighting outlining the head, ears, shoulders, and suit edges. Composition is a tight upper-body portrait in a vertical 9:16 frame, subject from mid-torso upward, symmetrical and imposing. Photorealistic detail, high contrast, moody noir lighting, sharp suit texture, realistic skin on hands and ears, dramatic depth, no text, no logos, no watermark.
